task: Move the spatula from the back to the side of the vessel
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A wooden table holds a metal pot, a red-handled spoon, and a purple cloth. The pot is metallic with a handle; the spoon has a red handle and a metallic body; the cloth is purple and textured. STRATEGY - First, grasp the spoon by its handle to avoid the red handle. Transport it to the side of the pot, then place it on the cloth. Failure modes include dropping the spoon or placing it on the table (not the cloth). AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the spoon at its handle; Step 2 grasp the handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the cloth; Step 4 place on the cloth.
Goal: on(spatula, cloth); stable(spatula)
Scene: pot, spatula, cloth, table
Step 1: reach(spatula)
  affordance_region: the handle of the red-handled spatula
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, spatula, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, spatula) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(spatula)
  affordance_region: the handle of the red-handled spatula
  contact: holding(spatula) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(spatula)
Step 3: transport(spatula -> cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the purple cloth
  spatial: above(spatula, cloth, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(spatula)
  done_when: above(spatula, cloth, 0.05)
Step 4: place(spatula -> cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the purple cloth
  contact: surface_contact(spatula, cloth) [completion]; released(spatula) [completion]
  pose: stable(spatula) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(spatula, cloth) AND released(spatula)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the handle of the red-handled spatula
the handle of the red-handled spatula
an empty area on the purple cloth
an empty area on the purple cloth
